tools.name: catalog_get
tools.description: Get the compact definition and type-specific metadata for one exact catalog ref. A dashboard/page location is required when a visual or filter is shared.

tools.name: catalog_list
tools.description: Browse one deterministic level of the authorized LeapView catalog hierarchy. Omit parent to list workspaces, then pass returned refs to continue browsing.

tools.name: catalog_search
tools.description: Search the complete authorized LeapView BI catalog across workspaces. Use this when you know words from a resource name or description but not its exact location.

tools.name: docs_read
tools.description: Read a bounded line window from one LeapView document returned by docs_search. Continue with nextOffset when truncated is true.

id.description: Stable doc:<path> ID returned by docs_search.

offset.description: First line to read, starting at 1; defaults to 1.

limit.description: Maximum lines to read; defaults to 200 and is also byte-bounded.

tools.name: docs_search
tools.description: Search LeapView's version-matched product documentation. Returns ranked, bounded matches with stable document IDs and excerpts. Use the optional path prefix to narrow broad searches.

query.description: Words or phrases to find in LeapView documentation.

path.description: Optional documentation path prefix, such as guides/build, api, cli, or visuals.

limit.description: Maximum matches to return; defaults to 8.

tools.name: query_visual
tools.description: Create one read-only visual from LeapView semantic model fields. Data is queried from semantic models; do not provide inline data.

rows.description: Row fields for matrix-style table output.

series.description: Optional series field for split charts.

sort.description: Sort fields applied to the query result.
